  Crafting
  * +    WEAPON +    AMMO +    FOOD +    CHEM +    ELECTRONIC +    ARMOR +    APPLIANCE                    Crafter: You]

 [RETURN] Craft, D[e]scribe, [f]ilter, [r]eset filter, [v] Read/unread, [V] Mark all as read, Show [u]nread recipes
 first, [n/a] Show/hide, Re[L]ated, [*] Favorite, [b]atch, Batch [+], Batch [-], [c]hoose crafter, [+] Prioritize, [-
 ] Deprioritize, [SPACE] Navigate details, [?] Keybindings
